tagline: The #1-ranked handyman franchise in America, backed by Ace Hardware and built for owner-operators who want to lead a skilled team without touching a tool.
description_short: Ace Handyman Services is an owner-operator franchise that puts the franchisee in charge of a team of professional craftsmen under the trusted Ace Hardware brand. With a sub-$250K entry point, strong Item 19 validation from first-year owners, and a market driven by the DIFM trend, this is a compelling opportunity for executives transitioning to business ownership.
market_intelligence_insight: The US handyman services industry is valued at $355B in 2026 with a 3.7% five-year CAGR; key tailwinds include aging housing stock, millennial homeownership, and a growing consumer shift from DIY to professional services.
item_19_headline: Top-quartile single territories averaged $775,337 in total revenue with 6% owner discretionary income in 2025.
ongoing_support: field coaching,annual convention,regional meetings,CRM platform,online marketing,recruiting tools
